probes.name: identity-db-writable
probes.description: Identity table is reachable AND writable. Performs a no-op INSERT + ROLLBACK inside a transaction to verify the connection has DDL / DML privileges. Identity being read-only aborts application boot because password rotation + lockout writes would fail silently.

probes.name: identity-schema-current
probes.description: The `identities` table has every column the module expects (id, email, password_hash, mfa_secret_encrypted, mfa_recovery_codes_hashed, email_verified_at, email_verification_token_hash, email_verification_expires_at, password_history_hashed, password_changed_at, last_login_at, last_failed_at, locked_until, failed_attempts_count, dob, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at). Catches unmigrated environments before they crash on first login.

probes.name: identity-kms-reachable
probes.description: MfaSecretEncryptor's backend (KMS / Vault / local) is reachable. Failure fails-open the MFA enrolment endpoint but keeps login working — MFA verification depends on decryption which can fall back to a hot-cached data-key. Marked critical because sustained KMS unavailability blocks new MFA enrolments and reduces the security posture.

probes.name: identity-hibp-reachable
probes.description: haveibeenpwned k-anonymity API reachable. Non-critical because the `strong_password` rule falls back to policy-only checks when HIBP is unavailable. Sustained unavailability degrades the security posture; ops should investigate.

probes.name: identity-hasher-configured
probes.description: The configured hasher (argon2id preferred, bcrypt fallback) is available in the current PHP runtime. Argon2id requires libsodium; if config selects argon2id but the extension is missing, boot fails immediately with a clear message rather than degrading silently to bcrypt.

probes.name: identity-lockout-scheduler-alive
probes.description: AutoUnlockExpiredLockoutsJob has run within the last 5 minutes. Failure indicates the queue worker is stuck; identities that should have auto-unlocked stay locked.

probes.name: identity-retention-current
probes.description: PurgeSoftDeletedIdentitiesJob has run within the last 25 hours. Missed runs risk breaching the GDPR erasure hold-period commitment.
